name: NETWORK-1 TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
summary: Network-1 Technologies, Inc. is an intellectual property development, licensing, and protection company. It owns 119 U.S. patents and 15 foreign patents across portfolios including M2M/IoT (eSIM authentication), HFT (high frequency trading latency), Cox (media content identification), Smart Home (IoT interoperability), Remote Power (Power over Ethernet), and Mirror Worlds (unified search/indexing). The company monetizes these patents through licensing and litigation. It also holds a $7,000,000 investment in ILiAD Biotechnologies, a clinical-stage biotech company.

products.name: M2M/IoT Patent Portfolio
products.description: 45 issued U.S. patents covering eSIM authentication technology for IoT, Machine-to-Machine, mobile devices, and automobiles; acquired December 2017.

products.name: HFT Patent Portfolio
products.description: 11 issued U.S. patents covering advanced high frequency trading technologies addressing speed and latency problems in trading systems; acquired March 2022.

products.name: Cox Patent Portfolio
products.description: 39 U.S. patents (all expired) covering enabling technology for identifying media content on the Internet and taking further actions based on identification.

products.name: Smart Home Patent Portfolio
products.description: 9 issued U.S. patents covering enabling technology to support interoperability of smart home IoT devices; acquired March 2025.

products.name: Remote Power Patent
products.description: Patent covering delivery of power over Ethernet (PoE) cables for remotely powering network devices; expired, no longer being enforced.

products.name: Mirror Worlds Patent Portfolio
products.description: Patents covering foundational technologies for unified search, indexing, displaying and archiving of documents; expired, no longer being monetized.

products.name: M2M/IoT Patent Portfolio
products.description: 45 issued U.S. patents covering eSIM authentication technology for IoT, Machine-to-Machine, mobile devices, smartphones, tablets, and automobiles.

products.name: HFT Patent Portfolio
products.description: 11 issued U.S. patents covering advanced high frequency trading technologies addressing speed and latency in trading systems.

products.name: Cox Patent Portfolio
products.description: 39 U.S. patents (all expired) covering enabling technology for identifying media content on the Internet and performing further actions.

products.name: Smart Home Patent Portfolio
products.description: 9 issued U.S. patents relating to enabling technology supporting interoperability of smart home IoT devices, acquired March 2025.

products.name: Remote Power Patent
products.description: Patent covering delivery of power over Ethernet (PoE) cables for remotely powering network devices; expired and no longer enforced.

products.name: Mirror Worlds Patent Portfolio
products.description: Patents covering foundational technologies enabling unified search, indexing, displaying, and archiving of documents; expired and no longer enforced.

partnerships.description: Seller of M2M/IoT Patent Portfolio; entitled to 14% of first $100M and 5% of net proceeds above $100M from monetization activities.
Network-1 invested $7,000,000, owning approximately 6.4% on non-fully diluted basis as of December 31, 2025.
Seller of Cox Patent Portfolio; provides consulting services and is entitled to 12.5% of net proceeds from licensing, sale or enforcement.
Seller of M2M/IoT Patent Portfolio; entitled to 14% of first $100M and 5% of net proceeds above $100M from monetization activities.
Network-1 invested $7,000,000 in ILiAD, owning approximately 6.4% on a non-fully diluted basis as of December 31, 2025.
Seller of Cox Patent Portfolio; provides consulting services and is entitled to 12.5% of net proceeds from licensing, sale, or enforcement.
Managing Member of M2M; provides consulting services regarding the M2M/IoT Patent Portfolio.
